title: slack -- Send & Reply Cheatsheet
desc: wkappbot slack send/reply for Slack communication. Eye = Slack daemon built-in (Socket Mode), no separate listener. Always reply to threads using --msg TS.
steps: REPLY: wkappbot slack reply "message" --msg <TS> -- thread reply
Eye integrates Slack -- no need for 'slack listen' separately
Claude asks: send via Slack + prompt simultaneously (Slack alone forbidden)
Bot name = cwd-based prefix, auto-detected from active card
